title: Esteemed Great Desolation
content:
Esteemed Great Desolation
 is one of the strongest cultivators of the 
Ancient Primordial Star System
 of the 
Outer Realm
. Despite not being a member of the 
Five Masters
, he is just as powerful as any of its members. 

He has 
Poison Essence
.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Background

3

History

3.1

Book Nine

3.2

Book Eleven

Appearance
[
]

He wears beast skin clothing and has huge piercings throughout his entire face. He has three needles on his lips that he refined from the three Great Desolation Celestials. They contain a deadly poison.

His mount is a huge lizard.

Background
[
]

His cultivation is quite powerful but his poison cultivation is even more powerful and it garnered him a lot of fame. He has a rivalry with the 
Second Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
.

History
[
]

Book Nine
[
]

He appeared at the 
Fallen Land
 during the Fallen Council competition. He taunted and challenged the 
Second Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
 to a battle. Afterwards, he left.

Soon after, he arrived at the Ancient Order Tomb. Due to not having any avatars, he forcefully threw multiple cultivators inside the Tomb and finally possessed the one that qualified to enter the Tomb.

Wang Lin and he worked together to kill 
Dao Master Miao Yin
's avatar inside the Tomb. He possessed the latter's body while Wang Lin stole almost 30% of his 
Joss Flames
 to upgrade his ancient slave, 
Ling Dong
.

Subsequently, the two were caught by an Ancient God hand and transported further inside the Tomb. This gave Wang Lin a chance to escape from Esteemed Great Desolation as while he seemed like a nice guy, he was merely working together with Wang Lin as they had a common goal.

After Wang Lin's stone platform reached the 9th level, a giant arm rushed towards, crushing everything between itself and the platform. Esteemed Great Desolation's avatar received a direct hit and was instantly destroyed along with his soul.

Enraged, he entered the Ancient Tomb with his original body after the expulsion fog retracted. However, he ended up trapped inside the Tomb after Wang Lin closed it.

Book Eleven
[
]

Over a century later, 
Sovereign
 begged 
Seven-Colored Daoist
 to allow Dao Master Miao Yin, 
Devil Master Nine Heavens
 and Esteemed Great Desolation to escape the Tomb so that they could destroy Wang Lin's 
Unnamed Wheel Formation
 and draw his remaining two arrows from 
Li Guang's Bow
.

The three appeared to kill Wang Lin but were intercepted by 
Dao Master Blue Dream
. After three days of battle, Esteemed Great Desolation was injured the most and escaped using a secret spell. His injuries were so bad that his lifespan fell to just 10 years.
